name: Thinking Indicator
summary: Animated thinking indicator that shows the AI agent is processing with a progress bar
goals: Provide visual feedback that the agent is actively thinking
Show thinking progress with an animated bar

specDetail.description: A ThinkingIndicator component with ThinkingBar that displays an animated progress indicator while the AI agent is processing. Shows a pulsing dot animation and an optional progress bar when thinking duration is tracked.

parameters.name: isThinking
parameters.description: Whether the agent is currently in a thinking state

parameters.name: phase
parameters.description: Current thinking phase label (e.g., 'Analyzing code', 'Generating response')

constraints: Must show a visible animation within 500ms of thinking start
Must display elapsed time updating every second
Must transition smoothly to response display when thinking ends

acceptanceCriteria.given: the AI agent starts processing a request
acceptanceCriteria.then: an animated thinking indicator is displayed with a progress bar and phase label

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
